info.name: MakeReady API
info.description: Complete API collection for MakeReady server with many-to-many Member-Organization support

request.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen for web clients
Redirects to Google OAuth for iOS clients
Exchange one-time auth code for session cookie (iOS only)
Get currently authenticated user (requires session cookie)
Logout current user

item.name: Members
item.description: Member endpoints with many-to-many organization support

request.description: Send SMS verification code to phone number. Returns organizations array if member exists.
Verify SMS code and create/update member. Auto-joins member to organization. Creates member session.
Get currently authenticated member profile (requires member session)
Check if member is authenticated and get member data
Logout current member (clear member session)
Get member profile by ID (requires member auth or org owner auth)
Update member profile (requires member auth or org owner auth)
Soft delete member (requires member auth or org owner auth)
Get all groups a member belongs to (requires member auth or org owner auth)
Get organization details (requires org owner auth)
Get current user's organization (requires auth)
Update organization name (requires org owner auth)

query.description: Search query for member name, email, or phone

request.description: Get all members in organization (requires org owner auth). Members include their full organizations array.
Get all members in a group (requires group owner auth)
Add member to group. Validates member belongs to same organization as group (many-to-many check).
Remove member from group (soft delete)
Create invite for QR code generation (requires auth)
Send group invitation via SMS (requires auth, must be group creator)
Get invite details by token (public, no auth required)
Get all users
Get user by ID
Generate QR code image (returns PNG)

item.name: Bible
item.description: Bible reading, search, and user features (highlights, notes, bookmarks)

request.description: List all available Bible translations
Get all 66 books for a specific translation
Read a full chapter (e.g., John 3). Book 43 = John. Includes user highlights/notes if authenticated.
Read a single verse (e.g., John 3:16)
Read a range of verses (e.g., John 3:1-5)
Full-text search across Bible verses
Download complete translation for offline use (~5-8 MB JSON)
Get all highlights for authenticated user (requires session cookie)
Create a verse highlight. Colors: YELLOW, BLUE, GREEN, ORANGE, PURPLE, PINK
Update highlight color
Delete a highlight
Get all notes for authenticated user
Get a specific note by ID

body.raw:
{
  "translationCode": "KJV",
  "bookNumber": 43,
  "chapter": 3,
  "verseStart": 16,
  "verseEnd": null,
  "content": "This is one of my favorite verses!"
}

request.description: Create a note on a verse or passage
Update note content
Delete a note
Get all bookmarks for authenticated user
Create a bookmark (label is optional)
Delete a bookmark

item.name: Smart Search
item.description: Intelligent Bible search with direct references and semantic/LLM search

request.description: Search by direct verse reference. Auto-detected patterns: 'John 3:16', 'Rom 8:28', 'Psalm 23'
Search by verse range (e.g., 'Genesis 1:1-3', 'John 3:16-17')
Get entire chapter (e.g., 'Psalm 23', 'Romans 8')
Semantic/LLM search for passages about love. Requires embeddings to be generated.
Semantic search for passages about grace
Semantic search for creation narrative
Semantic search for marriage passages
Get book name autocomplete suggestions for search input

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Young Adults Bible Study",
  "description": "Weekly Bible study for young professionals",
  "isPrivate": true,
  "ageRangeMin": 18,
  "ageRangeMax": 35
}

request.description: Get invite information including QR code for sharing. Returns group code, invite URL, and base64 QR code image.

item.name: Events
item.description: Event management with recurrence, attendees, and attachments

body.raw:
{
  "type": "MEETING",
  "title": "Weekly Bible Study",
  "description": "Join us for our weekly study",
  "date": "2025-01-15T18:00:00Z",
  "startTime": "18:00",
  "endTime": "19:30",
  "visibility": "PRIVATE",
  "locationName": "Community Center",
  "locationAddress": "123 Main St, Dallas, TX",
  "recurrenceFrequency": "WEEKLY",
  "alertMinutesBefore": 60
}

request.description: Get a public event by its 6-digit code (no auth required)
RSVP to a private event (requires member auth)
RSVP to a public event by code (no auth required)

item.name: Group Join Requests
item.description: Join request workflow for group code joining

request.description: Submit a join request (requires member auth)
Check status of own join request (requires member auth)
List join requests (requires group owner auth)
Approve a join request (requires group owner auth)
Reject a join request (requires group owner auth)
